criteria.name: AI Music Generation
criteria.description: Ability to generate original music based on user input such as text prompts, genre selection, or style descriptions.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The extent to which users can customize generated music, including editing capabilities, instrument selection, and arrangement modifications.

criteria.name: Licensing and Rights
criteria.description: Clarity and flexibility of licensing terms for commercial use of AI-generated music.

criteria.name: AI Singing Voice Generation/Voice changing
criteria.description: Ability to generate or modify singing voices using AI, including control over parameters like timbre, style, and volume.

criteria.name: User Interface/Ease of Use
criteria.description: The user-friendliness and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
